title: Little Caesars
html:
Stub. First mentioned in 2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 2 41 11 am f76d9c99.

Pizza chain. Yahir scraped the full corporate nutrition PDF (sides, wings, dips, thin crust, extras) at 2:41 a.m. on 2025-07-18 as seed data for BroMenu / Brotein. Plays the role of a "low anabolic scoring" chain in the dataset — high sodium, low protein.
